providers.notes: X-Ray, interaction telemetry, and raw automatic page views are disabled; a first-loaded privacy plugin establishes the normalized initial page before automatic telemetry plugins, manually recorded navigation uses allowlisted App Router families, author UUID media segments are bounded, and the exact WalletConnect stale-topic message shape is redacted

providers.sampling: trace sample rate 0.1; custom logs use their producer policy
providers.release: inherited from the Sentry Next.js build integration
providers.notes: Replay remains opt-in and is not enabled by this change

providers.sampling: consented production sessions; no custom event sampler
providers.notes: autocapture and automatic page views are disabled
Overlap with Mixpanel is externally unverified; preserve until dashboard ownership is confirmed

signals.name: Page Viewed
signals.question: Which product route families are viewed?
signals.sampling: consented production sessions
signals.privacy: normalized route pattern and logical page, page group, booleans, and profile-viewer cohort only; known Waves/profile aliases use colon parameters and fallback App Router families use bracket parameters

signals.name: Auth Forced Logout
signals.question: How often does auth failure visibly force a logout?
signals.sampling: consented production sessions
signals.privacy: auth-state, reason, route pattern, client type, and booleans only
signals.externalUsage: repo Mixpanel runbook; live dashboard unverified

signals.name: Auth Reauth Prompt Shown
signals.question: How often does auth failure interrupt users with reauthentication?
signals.sampling: consented production sessions
signals.privacy: auth-state, reason, route pattern, client type, and booleans only
signals.externalUsage: repo Mixpanel runbook; live dashboard unverified

signals.name: Auth Session Refresh Recovered
signals.question: How often does session refresh recover without visible product failure?
signals.sampling: consented production sessions
signals.privacy: auth outcome, client type, endpoint family, and status bucket only
signals.externalUsage: repo Mixpanel runbook; live dashboard unverified

signals.name: Auth Session Refresh Succeeded
signals.question: What is the successful auth-validation denominator?
signals.sampling: Sentry log transport plus consented production Mixpanel sessions
signals.privacy: auth outcome, client type, route family, endpoint family, and status bucket only
signals.externalUsage: repo Mixpanel runbook; live dashboard unverified
signals.replacement: Remove the Mixpanel destination after dashboard usage is verified absent or migrated

signals.name: Auth Session Refresh Product Impact
signals.question: When does refresh failure create a visible reauth or logout outcome?
signals.sampling: One event per auth condition and account session until recovery, sent to Sentry plus consented production Mixpanel sessions
signals.privacy: auth outcome, client type, route family, endpoint family, and booleans only
signals.externalUsage: repo Mixpanel runbook; live dashboard unverified

signals.name: Auth Session Upgrade Prompt Shown
signals.question: How often are users blocked by the session-upgrade prompt?
signals.sampling: consented production sessions
signals.privacy: auth-state, reason, route pattern, client type, and booleans only
signals.externalUsage: repo Mixpanel runbook; live dashboard unverified

signals.name: Auth Validation Cancelled
signals.question: How often is validation cancelled without product failure?
signals.sampling: Sentry log transport plus consented production Mixpanel sessions
signals.privacy: auth outcome, client type, route family, endpoint family, and status bucket only
signals.externalUsage: repo Mixpanel runbook; live dashboard unverified
signals.replacement: Remove the Mixpanel destination after dashboard usage is verified absent or migrated

signals.name: Auth Validation Failed While Connected
signals.question: How often does a connected wallet still experience visible auth failure?
signals.sampling: consented production sessions
signals.privacy: auth-state, reason, route pattern, client type, and booleans only
signals.externalUsage: repo Mixpanel runbook; live dashboard unverified

signals.name: Wave Feed Load Started
signals.question: How many Wave feed load attempts start?
signals.sampling: consented production Mixpanel sessions; omitted from Sentry
signals.privacy: route family, load source, cached/native booleans, and buckets only
signals.externalUsage: repo Mixpanel runbook; live dashboard unverified
signals.replacement: Remove after dashboard usage is verified absent or migrate to an owned product denominator

signals.name: Wave Feed Load Succeeded
signals.question: Does the Wave feed become available, and how long does success take?
signals.sampling: consented production Mixpanel sessions; Sentry samples 5% of server_initial and initial_visible successes and omits cache, background-sync, and native-backfill successes
signals.privacy: Sentry receives numeric duration; Mixpanel receives duration/drop-count buckets and booleans; both use route families
signals.externalUsage: repo Mixpanel runbook; live dashboard unverified

signals.name: Wave Feed Load Cancelled
signals.question: How much load volume is normal navigation cancellation?
signals.sampling: consented production Mixpanel sessions; omitted from Sentry because cancellation is a normal non-failure
signals.privacy: route family, load source, cached/native booleans, status, and duration bucket only
signals.externalUsage: repo Mixpanel runbook; live dashboard unverified
signals.replacement: Remove after dashboard usage is verified absent or migrate to an owned cancellation-rate signal

signals.name: Wave Feed Load Failed
signals.question: How often does feed failure remain a visible product failure?
signals.sampling: all Sentry warnings plus consented production Mixpanel sessions; no custom failure sampler
signals.privacy: route family, error/status buckets, load source, and booleans only
signals.externalUsage: repo Mixpanel runbook; live dashboard unverified

signals.name: auth_session_refresh
signals.question: Which refresh code path, status bucket, and duration bucket occurred?
signals.sampling: no custom sampler; failures are warnings
signals.privacy: client type, outcome, status code/bucket, and duration bucket only
signals.externalUsage: documented Sentry query examples; live alerts unverified

signals.name: mobile_launch_timing
signals.question: Where is cold app launch time spent before first useful content?
signals.sampling: 5% normal; 100% focused non-desktop Waves, Messages, and Notifications routes; slow/timeout/error always
signals.privacy: route/endpoint families including /[user]/rep, bounded device/app cohorts, buckets, numeric durations, and auth cohort only

signals.name: ui.drop_popup.open
signals.question: How long does the drop popup code path take to become ready?
signals.sampling: inherits Sentry trace sampling
signals.privacy: route family, source, mobile cohort, and numeric duration only

signals.name: drop_popup_ready
signals.question: Compatibility copy of drop-popup readiness in sampled RUM sessions
signals.sampling: AWS RUM sampled sessions
signals.privacy: route family, source, mobile cohort, and numeric duration only; identifiers and full route removed 2026-07-13

signals.name: ab_card_impression
signals.question: How often is the Art Blocks card surface rendered?
signals.sampling: AWS RUM sampled sessions
signals.privacy: fixed surface name only; href, contract, and token identifiers removed 2026-07-13
signals.replacement: Move ownership to consented Mixpanel only after AWS RUM usage and volume are verified

signals.name: ab_card_link_out
signals.question: Which Art Blocks outbound action is selected?
signals.sampling: AWS RUM sampled sessions
signals.privacy: bounded target only; href, contract, and token identifiers removed 2026-07-13
signals.replacement: Move ownership to consented Mixpanel only after AWS RUM usage is verified

signals.name: ab_card_live_open
signals.question: How long is the Art Blocks live viewer kept open?
signals.sampling: AWS RUM sampled sessions
signals.privacy: duration bucket only; raw duration and identifiers removed 2026-07-13
signals.replacement: Move ownership to consented Mixpanel only after AWS RUM usage is verified

signals.sampling: only with a sampled parent Sentry request trace
signals.privacy: fixed route/data path, request count, and anonymous/authenticated cohort only

signals.sampling: only with a sampled parent Sentry request trace
signals.privacy: fixed route/data path, request count, and anonymous/authenticated cohort only

signals.name: waves.index.server_data
signals.question: Does the Waves index retain its zero-API server data path?
signals.sampling: only with a sampled parent Sentry request trace
signals.privacy: fixed route/data path and zero request count only

signals.name: waves.metadata.fetch
signals.question: How long does the Wave metadata server path take?
signals.sampling: only with a sampled parent Sentry request trace
signals.privacy: fixed route/data path, request count, and anonymous/authenticated cohort only

signals.name: waves.initial_feed.fetch

signals.sampling: only with a sampled parent Sentry request trace
signals.privacy: fixed route/data path and anonymous/authenticated cohort only; request count is omitted because multipart hydration can add nested requests

signals.name: reaction.*
signals.question: What code-level sequence preceded a reaction failure or reconciliation anomaly?
signals.sampling: breadcrumbs attach to captured Sentry events; error capture has a 60-second dedupe window
signals.privacy: bounded route and endpoint families, source/action/status/error enums, booleans, mutation sequence, and duration buckets only; raw mutation/drop/wave/profile identifiers, reaction values, paths, endpoints, and error messages were removed 2026-07-17

signals.name: notifications.* error diagnostics
signals.question: Which push-notification setup or delivery operation failed?
signals.sampling: actionable exceptions plus bounded retry breadcrumbs
signals.privacy: legacy profile/error extras remain under review; notification content is not an approved attribute
signals.replacement: Follow-up migration to status/error buckets and profile cohort
